ideal_must_detect.matched_text: do not transmit Aadhaar/PAN/GSTIN over email
replace samples with “000000000000”/“AAAAA0000A” style templates in mockups only
add the Sustainability Working Group to the insider list
no breach of the information barrier detected
temporary trading-window restriction applies only to the Sustainability Working Group per Code of Conduct

must_detect.matched_text:
Data impact: no Aadhaar intake on the microsite; CRM connectors disabled; training samples in one PDF showed “PAN: AAAAA0000A” and “GSTIN: 22AAAAA0000A1Z5” as dummy labels; these are placeholders and not linked to any individual.
Children’s data: not collected; services are B2B; age gating not applicable; no profiling of minors under 18.
DPDPA compliance: processing basis was consent for marketing; no sensitive personal data stored; Data Principal requests via privacy@banyangrid.example.in will be actioned within statutory timelines.
SEBI/PIT context: documents indexed included only generic “Insider List Procedure (Training Copy)” and “Information Barrier SOP (Public Extract)” already posted on our careers page; no insider names, PANs, or trade windows disclosed therein.
ESG/climate materials: the “Climate Risk Toolkit v2” whitepaper and CSR case studies were accessed; these are already announced on our website and are non-financial educational content.
Crypto reference: the “CryptoPay Sandbox Guide” describes a demo workflow and testnet addresses; no wallets, private keys, or commercial terms were present.
Positive control note: during verification, we identified a file named “Q4 FY26 Sustainability KPI_Draft.pdf” in a nearby restricted folder; although logs show no download, treat this draft as UPSI under SEBI (PIT) Regulations until Board release and add the Sustainability Working Group to the insider list.
